positive: A stylized, minimalist vector illustration of a cosmic biome. The main subject is a group of glowing, stylized nebula flora (like bioluminescent cherry blossom branches and stylized crystalline foliage) blooming around a central crescent moon and distant, geometric constellations. The composition must feature strong, clean silhouettes against a deep indigo and cosmic teal background. Use high contrast, glowing neon accents (electric blue, magenta, cyan) that evoke starlight. The overall aesthetic should be harmonious, fantastical, and graphic, suitable for a repeating apparel pattern or a central chest print. No photorealism; vector art style, perfect for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, messy, dirty, grainy, poor detail, blur, text, watermark, logo, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low resolution, copyright, trademark, celebrity, cartoonish, oil paint, watercolor
